name: Charles Osgood
abstract: Charles Osgood Wood III (January 8, 1933 – January 23, 2024) was an American radio and television commentator, writer, and musician. Osgood was best known both for being the host of CBS News Sunday Morning, a role he held for over 22 years from April 10, 1994, until September 25, 2016, and The Osgood File, a series of daily radio comment…

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: Sunday Morning with Charles Kuralt had become one of my favorite t.v. shows, as it is now with Charles Osgood.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
